arxiv.org.description: Open-access preprint server; dominant venue for ML/physics/CS research but not peer-reviewed

medrxiv.org.description: Health sciences preprint server, not peer-reviewed

ssrn.com.description: Social sciences preprint repository, not peer-reviewed

openreview.net.description: Open peer-review platform for ML conferences (ICLR, NeurIPS)

openalex.org.description: Open scholarly metadata index (aggregator, not a publisher)

cambridge.org.description: Peer-reviewed journals and books (Cambridge University Press)

frontiersin.org.description: Open-access journals with mixed review reputation (Frontiers)

mdpi.com.description: Open-access journals with mixed review reputation (MDPI)

nytimes.com.description: Established newspaper with editorial standards (New York Times)

theguardian.com.description: Established newspaper with editorial standards (The Guardian)

economist.com.description: Established weekly with editorial standards (The Economist)

wsj.com.description: Established newspaper with editorial standards (Wall Street Journal)

ft.com.description: Established newspaper with editorial standards (Financial Times)

en.wikipedia.org.description: Crowd-edited encyclopaedia; useful for orientation, not citation

wikipedia.org.description: Crowd-edited encyclopaedia; useful for orientation, not citation

github.com.description: Code hosting; quality varies by project

medium.com.description: Open blogging platform, no editorial review

blogspot.com.description: Open blogging platform, no editorial review

wordpress.com.description: Open blogging platform, no editorial review
